text:
complete remission. Switching to 5-ASA can be considered in some cases, if 5-ASA has not previously failed and after a period of sustained deep remission.
Comments: Medical treatments for UC should be divided between those that induce remission (5-ASA, corticosteroids, anti-TNF therapy, calcineurin inhibitors and, probably, probiotics) and those that maintain remission (5-ASA, thiopurines, anti-TNF therapy, vedolizumab and certain probiotics).
